_publications._publicationTitle: A multicenter study of neurofibromatosis type 1 utilizing deep learning for whole body tumor identification.

_contextSnippet: The prediction results of the ResNet18 model on the test set had an accuracy of 0.743, a recall of 0.882, and a specificity of 0.611
details: Accuracy of 0.743, recall of 0.882, and specificity of 0.611 on test set of 35 images (17 MPNSTs and 18 PNFs)
